setup.step1_prompt: Choose the channel where bot commands are allowed:
setup.already_configured: 🔒 This server is already configured. The setup wizard is locked to prevent accidental reconfiguration.

errors.no_permission: ❌ You need the **{permission}** permission to use this command.
errors.wrong_channel: ❌ Commands can only be entered on the main channel: {channel}.
errors.guild_only: ❌ This command can only be used inside a server.

wg.absent_list_header: 📊 **Top absences on {world} world, based on {report_count} report numbers:**

worlds.added: ✅ World added successfully {world} with assigned channel {channel}.
worlds.deleted: 🗑️ Deleted world {world} (and its members/reports/absences). Do you feel like Thanos, the destroyer of worlds?

members.added: ✅ The number of lambs of God has increased.
members.deleted: 🗑️ {nick} has been kicked out of the guild.

reports.withdrawn: ⏪ The latest report has been withdrawn.
reports.none_found: ❌ No reports were found for this world.
reports.all_cleared: 💥 The absence database and the report counter have been cleared for this server.

security.phishing_blocked: 🛡️ **A dangerous link has been blocked!** {mention} tried to send a SCAM.
security.scam_image_blocked: 🛡️ **Suspicious scam image blocked!** {mention}'s attachment matched known scam patterns.

recruitment.dm_accepted: 🎉 Congratulations! Your application to **{guild}** has been accepted. Your nickname has been set to **{nickname}**. Welcome aboard!
